race.name: Levi Ski Marathon
race.tagline: Seventy kilometers across the fells of Kittilä — Finnish Lapland's biggest ski marathon beneath the Arctic sky.

climate.description: Levi sits in Finnish Lapland at 67°N, just above the Arctic Circle. Reliable snow from November to May. April racing offers returning sunlight and milder temperatures, though exposed fell terrain can be bitterly cold and windy.
challenges: Wind exposure on open fell terrain
Variable snow conditions between sheltered valleys and wind-scoured fells
Late-season sun can create crusty surface conditions

course.primary: 70km through the fell landscape surrounding Levi ski resort in Kittilä. The course traverses multiple fells with significant climbing, passing through birch forest and above-treeline tundra with panoramic Lapland views.
course.grooming: Good Finnish standard, excellent near resort area
features: Mix of above-treeline and birch forest skiing
Based at Finland's largest ski resort
Both classic and skate technique options

nordic_lab_rating.score_note: Strong scenery and snow reliability scores. Levi's resort infrastructure provides better accessibility than most Lapland events, pushing it into Tier 2.

history.summary: The Levi Ski Marathon is held in the fell landscape around Levi, Finland's largest ski resort, in the municipality of Kittilä. The 70km course takes skiers across multiple fells in the heart of Finnish Lapland. Levi is famous as a World Cup alpine skiing venue, and the ski marathon leverages its extensive trail infrastructure.
notable_facts: Based at Levi, Finland's largest and most visited ski resort
Kittilä municipality is one of Finland's largest by area
Levi hosts annual FIS Alpine Ski World Cup events
The surrounding fells reach up to 531m (Levi fell summit)
Finnish Lapland's long snow season allows racing well into April

youtube_data.search_query: Levi Ski Marathon cross country ski race Levi

videos.title: WhiSkiCo - Interski 2023 - The Levi Project
videos.description:
A short film focusing on the CSIA's Interski Team at Interski 2023 in Levi.

This film is an attempt at a remake of a short film call Run Like The Wind, by Peter Mckinnon. I wanted to see if i could replicate such an awesome short film to improve my editing skills, and to use a subject matter that means so much to me, along with the people in it. 

To watch Run Like The Wind by Peter Mckinnon, the link is below:-

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=VZCt1gQAu5M

videos.title: Yllas - Levi 70, Runner vs Ski Race, round 2
videos.description:
My second attempt at a cross-country ski race, after about 300 km experience on the ski in my entire life. 
Yllas-Levi ski race classic style, 2018

To support this channel, you may do this on the price of a cup of coffee here: https://www.patreon.com/martinstefanov

Thanks a ton!
Martin

videos.description: VISMA SKI CLASSICS - 2022.04.09 - YLLAS-LEVI - 70 KM - HD
videos.curation_reason: Full race coverage from the Visma Ski Classics series showing elite-level racing on the Yllas-Levi course.

quotes.text: In the beginning it looks horrible, first 20 kilometers I think are the hardest but just don't give up just keep pushing and then after the 20 kilometer mark it's all USA. The hardest part is behind and it's all downhill from now on.
